title: High School Confidential!
writer: Robert Blees, Texas Joe Foster, Lewis Meltzer
actors: Russ Tamblyn, Jan Sterling, John Drew Barrymore
plot: A tough kid comes to a new high school and begins muscling his way into the drug scene. This is a typical morality play of the era, filled with a naive view of drugs, nihilistic beat poetry, and some incredible '50s slang.
